original_text: Balance sheet metrics indicate moderate leverage with adequate liquidity positioning. The current ratio in Q4 2025 was 0.9964 (K008), derived from current assets of $10,163,000,000 (C051) against current liabilities of $10,200,000,000 (C052), suggesting working capital is roughly balanced. Leverage remains conservative with debt-to-equity at 0.5720 (K009), calculated from total debt of $6,648,000,000 (C049) and stockholders' equity of $11,623,000,000 (C047). Net debt position was $1,217,000,000 (K010) after accounting for cash equivalents of $5,431,000,000 (C048), indicating the company maintains substantial cash reserves relative to its debt obligations.
revised_text: Balance sheet metrics indicate moderate leverage with adequate liquidity positioning. The current ratio in Q3 2025 was 1.0187, derived from current assets of $9,412,000,000 (C060) against current liabilities of $9,239,000,000 (C061), suggesting working capital is roughly balanced. Leverage remains conservative with debt-to-equity at 0.5638, calculated from total debt of $6,636,000,000 (C058) and stockholders' equity of $11,770,000,000 (C056). Net debt position was $1,654,000,000 after accounting for cash equivalents of $4,982,000,000 (C057), indicating the company maintains substantial cash reserves relative to its debt obligations.
changes_summary: Changed period from Q4 2025 to Q3 2025 to align with As-Of Date of 2025-08 (Q4 2025 data would not be available until November 2025). Updated all financial metrics to reflect Q3 2025 balance sheet data: current assets ($9,412M), current liabilities ($9,239M), total debt ($6,636M), stockholders' equity ($11,770M), and cash equivalents ($4,982M). Recalculated ratios accordingly: current ratio (1.0187), debt-to-equity (0.5638), and net debt ($1,654M). Removed Q4 calc_ids (K008, K009, K010) as they reference future period data; ratios now derived directly from cited Q3 chunks.
